context: Tests whether the agent uses the transcribe.sh script with the correct flags for a multi-speaker meeting transcription use case. Specifically checks for speaker diarization, structured JSON output, and quiet mode appropriate for automated pipelines.

checklist.name: transcribe.sh entrypoint
checklist.description: The solution invokes transcribe.sh as the transcription tool rather than calling the ElevenLabs Python API or another transcription library directly

checklist.name: Diarize flag used
checklist.description: The transcribe.sh invocation includes the --diarize flag

checklist.name: JSON flag used
checklist.description: The transcribe.sh invocation includes the --json flag

checklist.name: Quiet mode flag used
checklist.description: The transcribe.sh invocation includes -q or --quiet to suppress status messages

checklist.name: Dynamic file path
checklist.description: The script accepts the audio file path as an argument or variable rather than a hardcoded filename
